content:
Posting reels to FB pages and IG profiles simultaneously - a 20 second video takes FB 30 seconds to upload/post, but the same video takes IG 2 minutes. Is that normal, or do I need to triple check the documentation in case I missed something?
Edit: can't change the title, but it was supposed to end with "wrong"

  submitted by   /u/EMike93309
[link]   [comments]
